note: Auto-recorded raw screen loops of the BuildTrack admin app (Playwright). No narration, no zoom/cursor-highlight editing. Real seeded demo data (tenant 'andes'). 1280x800, silent. Each clip ships as VP9 .webm + H.264 .mp4 (faststart) with a .jpg poster. Wiring into the landing Videos section is a follow-up (kept separate from PR #12).

caption.es: Asistencia auto-sugerida desde el reloj, clima, tareas del día, notas y fotos con visor.
caption.en: Clock-based attendance suggestions, weather, daily tasks, notes and photos with a lightbox.

caption.es: Aprobación de marcajes con ubicación GPS, distancia y enlaces a Google Maps.
caption.en: Approve time punches with GPS location, distance and Google Maps links.

caption.es: Kanban por proyecto: arrastra tarjetas entre columnas, con comentarios y adjuntos.
caption.en: Per-project Kanban: drag cards across columns, with comments and attachments.

caption.es: Seguimiento de contrato por proyecto: presupuesto vs. gastado, con desglose de costos.
caption.en: Per-project contract tracking: budget vs. spent, with a cost breakdown.
